name: Needles Neos Personal Injury Case Management API
what_it_does: Needles Neos (Assembly Software) plaintiff personal injury case management REST API for contingency fee law firms managing accident, injury, and mass tort litigation. Enables AI agents to manage personal injury case and client intake for plaintiff firm case management automation, handle medical record tracking and treatment chronology for medical documentation automation, access insurance and defendant information management for case investigation automation, retrieve settlement valuation and demand letter workflow for case resolution automation, manage statute of limitations and litigation deadline tracking for personal injury docket management, handle lien tracking (medical, Medicare, Medicaid) for settlement disbursement automation, access case status and stage management for personal injury workflow automation, retrieve firm productivity and case value analytics for plaintiff firm KPI reporting, manage staff assignment and case ownership for firm operations automation, and integrate Needles Neos with medical records retrieval services, e-signature platforms, and court filing systems for personal injury firm automation.
use_cases: Managing PI cases from plaintiff firm agents
Tracking medical treatment from documentation agents
best_when: A plaintiff personal injury, workers compensation, or mass tort law firm wanting AI agents to automate client intake, medical chronology tracking, insurance carrier management, settlement workflow, and disbursement management within Needles Neos as the case management system.
avoid_when: MEDICARE AND MEDICAID LIEN RESOLUTION MANDATORY BEFORE SETTLEMENT DISBURSEMENT: Automated settlement disbursement must resolve all Medicare Secondary Payer (MSP) and Medicaid lien obligations before client funds are distributed; automated disbursement without lien clearance creates federal Medicare Secondary Payer Act liability for attorney and creates state Medicaid recoupment demand. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DEADLINE LEGAL RESPONSIBILITY: Automated statute of limitations tracking in Needles Neos provides docket support but legal responsibility for deadline accuracy remains with the attorney; automated deadline warnings are not a substitute for attorney case review; automated calendar-only reliance without attorney review creates legal malpractice exposure for missed SOL. MEDICAL RECORD PHI HIPAA COMPLIANCE: Automated medical record intake and storage in Needles Neos for personal injury cases contains patient PHI obtained under HIPAA authorization; automated PHI handling must comply with minimum necessary standard and attorney-client privilege protections; automated medical record sharing beyond litigation team creates HIPAA and privilege violation.

auth.notes: Needles Neos uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Assembly Software parent company. Needles founded 1985 as personal injury case management system. Neos is cloud-native version of Needles (launched 2019). Assembly Software (private equity-backed) portfolio includes Needles, TrialWorks, and other plaintiff firm software. 7,000+ plaintiff law firms. Personal injury, workers comp, and mass tort focus. Competes with Filevine, Litify, and SmartAdvocate for personal injury case management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user subscription; Neos cloud and legacy Needles on-premise options; medical records integration add-ons
pricing.notes: Assembly Software PE-backed. Needles founded 1985. Neos cloud 2019. 7,000+ plaintiff firms. PI, workers comp, mass tort. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; case and medical record queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — CASE AND MEDICAL RECORD EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Needles Neos does not support native webhooks; automated medical record receipt, case stage updates, and settlement events require scheduled polling aligned with plaintiff firm daily case review cycles

MEDICARE SECONDARY PAYER LIEN CLEARANCE BEFORE DISBURSEMENT: Automated settlement disbursement workflow must obtain Medicare Secondary Payer conditional payment amount and final demand before any client or attorney fee disbursement; automated disbursement without MSP lien resolution creates personal attorney liability under MSP Act for misappropriated Medicare claim

STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS MULTI-STATE ACCURACY: Automated SOL tracking in Needles Neos for multi-state plaintiff firms must correctly apply state-specific SOL periods (motor vehicle accident: 2 years in CA, 3 years in NY, 6 years in ME); automated SOL calculation using wrong state creates missed deadline and malpractice exposure; verify state-specific SOL per matter jurisdiction

Needles on-premise vs Neos cloud API architecture difference — legacy Needles (on-premise) and Neos (cloud) have different API architecture; automated integrations built for Neos REST API will not work on legacy Needles on-premise; verify whether firm has migrated to Neos before API implementation; mixed Neos/Needles firms may have some cases in each system

Medical record chain of custody for litigation use — automated medical record intake must maintain chain of custody documentation (source, date received, authorization used); medical records used in litigation without proper HIPAA authorization and chain of custody create evidentiary challenges and potential PHI sanction

Assembly Software PE portfolio consolidation risk — Assembly Software is PE-backed and acquires multiple plaintiff firm software companies; product consolidation or migration may affect Neos API investment priority; monitor Assembly Software portfolio strategy before long-term Neos API automation investment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Personal injury case management. SOC2, HIPAA. API key. US. Client PHI, medical records, and settlement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: PI case management. SOC2, HIPAA. API key. US. Client PHI, medical records, and settlement disbursement data.
